data.name: 百合花撩亂!美少女的百合生活
data.detailed_description:
⏹︎ 遊戲背景介紹

距離上次「巫女」與「妖怪之王」之間的對決已經過去數百年，隨著妖怪之王的封印與巫女的死去，如今妖怪已經早已不再出現在世人面前，而過去那些唯一能與妖怪抗衡，能夠使用特殊法術的人們，也將他們的力量展現在名為「神武祭」的新型比賽上，並宛如明星一般以選手的身分相互較勁。

然而，妖怪之王並非死亡。隨著封印的逐漸弱化，躲藏於山林之中的妖怪們也開始躁動。

與此同時，身為這個時代的巫女，名為凜音的少女，也與自己的女僕一同轉學到了專門培養選手的學校裡就讀。在這裡認識新的夥伴與戀人的同時，凜音也將努力與妖怪們戰鬥，並逐漸了解到關於巫女的秘密。

⏹︎ 遊戲特色

本作為傳統的RPG遊戲，並且加入了百合要素。

主角凜音可在遊戲中與其中一位女角色交往，並且並肩作戰、揭開謎團。

⏹︎ 角色介紹

【凜音】

本作的女主角。出身名門世家的大小姐。

過去一直背負著巫女的責任消滅妖怪，並對神武祭這種新型比賽感到不屑。

【雪螢】

凜音的青梅竹馬，同時也是一直陪伴在她身邊的女僕。

十分重視凜音，並在私底下為了保護凜音而做出許多努力。

另外，儘管身分為女僕，但在與凜音的相處中卻非常強勢。

【彩夢】

出生於普通家庭的少女，因一次偶然的機會被校長邀請入學，並一直以成為職業選手為目標而努力著。

【小桃】

嬌小可愛的貓娘妖怪。

雖然一開始被凜音攻擊，但卻沒有因此討厭凜音，反而成為凜音的伙伴之一，與她一起對付妖怪。

data.short_description: 原本以為可以與學校中的美少女們一同享受校園生活，卻沒想到學校中竟然隱藏著陰謀…
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)

data.name: Yuri Blossom!
data.detailed_description:
⏹︎ Summary

It has been several hundred years since the last showdown of the "Shrine Maiden" and the "King of Yokais," which led to the Shrine Maiden sealing the King of Yokais at the cost of her life. Nowadays, yokais are rarely seen, and those who used special power to fight against yokais back in the days brought their talent to a new type of competition, the "Jinmu Festival," and competed against each other like celebrities.

However, the King of Yokais never perished, and as its seal weakens day by day, the yokais hidden in the unmanned territory are starting to stir.

Meanwhile, the Shrine Maiden in the current era, a girl named Rinne, has transferred to a school that specializes in cultivating Jinmu Festival players. While getting to know new companions and lovers here, Rinne will battle yokais and discover the secrets behind Shrine Maidens.

⏹︎ Features

This game is a traditional RPG that also features yuri (girls' love) elements.

The protagonist, Rinne, can develop a romantic relationship with one of the female characters, fighting alongside her and uncovering the mysteries together.

⏹︎ Characters

【Rinne】

The heroine. A highborn young master.

She has been serving the Shrine Maiden's duty of fighting yokais and despises Jinmu Festivals.

【Yukiho】

Rinne's childhood playmate and her maid.

She values her relationship with Rinne and has made many efforts to protect Rinne without her knowing.

【Ayame】

A girl born in an ordinary family and attended the school because of the principal's invitation, and has been striving to become a pro player.

Although she had the taste of her first defeat after Rinne transferred, she was not discouraged and saw Rinne as her goal and kept challenging her.

【Momo】

A petite and cute catgirl yokai.

Although Rinne attacked her when they first met, she did not hold a grudge and instead became one of her companions, fighting yokais by her side.

She is mischievous and often angers Rinne, who threatens to exorcise her every time they quarrel.

Moreover, they seem to have known each other for a long time, even longer than Yukiho?

data.short_description: What was projected to be a happy school life with cute schoolgirls became overshadowed by a conspiracy in the school...

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor:
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
